title: Activate GoJS Production License Key
description:
## Context
The production environment is showing a GoJS evaluation watermark, indicating the license key needs to be activated or renewed.

## Action
Activate the GoJS license key in the production environment to remove the evaluation software watermark from the ERD diagram.
acceptance_criteria: GoJS evaluation watermark is removed from production ERD
License key is properly configured in the production environment
ux_changes: Removed GoJS evaluation watermark from the production ERD.
implementation_notes: Recurring GoJS license issue. Key was activated on production.
comment_summary: Developer confirmed the key was activated on production.
